description_for_human: Global freight marketplace connecting shippers with carriers. Find loads, post freight, get competitive bids.
description_for_model: Loadly is a global freight logistics marketplace operating in 47 languages across 190+ countries. Shippers post freight loads with origin, destination, cargo type, and weight. Carriers submit competitive bids. Upon bid acceptance, secure real-time messaging is unlocked. Supports cargo types: general, hazardous, perishable, oversized, fragile. Fleet types: TIR/semi-truck, rigid truck, van, flatbed, tanker, reefer. Marketplace URL: https://loadlyapp.com/en/marketplace
